title: Make ideas your own
highlight: You can now rename ideas, edit their tags, and share them straight to other apps.
features: Action plans now live on their own page — swipe left on an idea (or tap Action plan in the bottom bar) and Dumpty drafts the plan right there
Messages from the team — replies to your feedback now show up in your Account tab
Rename any idea — tap the pencil next to its title
Edit an idea's tags — add your own or remove the ones that don't fit
Share an idea straight to another app with the new Share button
improvements: Your screen stays awake while you're recording, so long takes don't get cut off by the screen timeout
Minor UI tweaks — a highlighted feedback row, a simpler share popup, and clearer labels
The bottom bar on an idea now has back, Idea, and Action plan — swipe or tap between them, just like the home tabs
Reminders on an idea are now highlighted so they're impossible to miss
Share, copy, and download are now one tidy Share & export popup
Ideas that fail to process now explain what happened instead of showing an empty page
Every idea now shows its word count
Clear your search and tag filters in one tap when nothing matches
Pop-up messages now sit on their own card so they don't blend into the page
fixes: The page no longer zooms in when you tap into search or checklist fields on iPhone
The "Record a note" button in the guest library now opens the recorder
Guest notes now finish transcribing after you sign in — ideas no longer get stuck on "Processing"
The record button now always appears — devices that can't show the animated orb get a simple mic button instead of a blank circle

title: Reminders
highlight: Reminders — tell Dumpty to remind you about an idea and it'll notify you at the right time.
features: Ask Dumpty to remind you about an idea — say something like "remind me tomorrow evening" and it'll send you a notification at the right time
fixes: Signing in with an email link now works correctly
Fixed the app asking for microphone access unexpectedly

title: Polish and fixes
features: Coming soon — peek at the features we're building next, from the Account tab
improvements: Your ideas now open instantly from the library
Smarter, more consistent tags on every idea

title: Dumpty is here
features: Record a voice idea and get a clean, titled, organized transcript back
Library with search, tags, and pinning
Action plans — turn any idea into a step-by-step checklist
Works offline and installs as an app
Try it as a guest, no account needed
